touches.ai_summary: LinkedIn connection request sent to Tariq Lopez at QuasarStudio. No response.
Cold email sent introducing our AI sales assistant platform and value prop for eCommerce sales teams. No response.
Follow-up email with case study on eCommerce sales team productivity gains. No response.
Cold call attempt to Tariq Lopez. Reached voicemail, left brief message about sales productivity tools.
Email with specific ROI calculator for their team size. No response.
LinkedIn message referencing mutual connection in eCommerce space. No response.
Cold call attempt. Reached voicemail again.

Initial qualification call with Tariq Lopez. Tariq mentioned he recently joined as Head of Sales and is evaluating tools to help his team scale. Discussed current pain points with manual note-taking and CRM updates. Tariq mentioned they're looking at Fireflies as well. Call felt exploratory but engaged.

questions_asked.question: What are the biggest time sinks for your sales team right now?
questions_asked.answer: Manual CRM updates and post-call summaries are eating up 3-4 hours per rep per week

questions_asked.question: How many reps would need access initially?
questions_asked.answer: We have 8 quota-carrying reps right now

questions_asked.question: How does your automation compare to Fireflies?
questions_asked.answer: We go beyond transcription with intelligent CRM auto-population and deal risk scoring

touches.ai_summary: LinkedIn message thanking Tariq for the call. No response.
Email with Fireflies comparison document. No response.

Second qualification call. Tariq shared more context on their eCommerce customer base and sales motion. Discussed automation needs specific to their use case. Tariq seemed interested but mentioned he needs to move quickly as he's building his stack.

questions_asked.question: What's your typical sales cycle length?
questions_asked.answer: Usually 2-3 weeks for our eCommerce platform deals

questions_asked.question: Can your platform integrate with our existing CRM stack?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native integrations with all major CRMs

next_steps: Schedule discovery call to map out workflows

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call diving into QuasarStudio's sales workflow and pain points. Tariq walked through their current process and areas where reps lose time. Discussed unlimited automation tier benefits. Tariq mentioned budget constraints but seemed motivated to find a solution.

questions_asked.question: What's your timeline for implementing a solution?
Who else is involved in the decision process?
questions_asked.answer: Mainly me right now, though I'll probably loop in our COO closer to contract

questions_asked.question: What kind of ROI should we expect in the first quarter?
questions_asked.answer: Most teams see 5-8 hours saved per rep per week, translating to 15-20% more selling time

objections: Budget is tight since I just joined and we're investing in several tools
next_steps: Prepare demo tailored to their eCommerce workflow

touches.ai_summary: LinkedIn message with article on sales productivity in eCommerce. No response.

Product demo focused on unlimited automation features and CRM integration. Tariq was engaged and asked detailed questions about implementation. He mentioned Fireflies again but seemed impressed by our additional automation capabilities. Discussed pricing briefly.

questions_asked.question: How long does implementation typically take?
questions_asked.answer: Most teams are fully onboarded within 1 week

questions_asked.question: Can we customize the automation workflows?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, the unlimited tier includes fully customizable automation templates

questions_asked.question: How are you feeling about the platform compared to Fireflies?
questions_asked.answer: I like the automation depth, but I need to be mindful of budget

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email with formal proposal and pricing for 8 seats unlimited automation tier. Tariq responded asking about discount options.

questions_asked.question: Is there any flexibility on the pricing given we're a smaller team?
questions_asked.answer: Let me discuss with my manager and get back to you

touches.ai_summary: Quick call attempt to discuss pricing. Reached voicemail.
Proposal review call. Discussed revised pricing with discount to fit Tariq's budget. He seemed relieved and ready to move forward but wanted to confirm a few terms.

questions_asked.question: Is this pricing locked in for the contract term?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, your rate is locked for the full annual contract

questions_asked.question: Does this pricing work within your budget?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, this helps a lot. I think we can move forward

next_steps: Send updated contract with adjusted pricing

touches.ai_summary: Negotiation call to finalize contract terms. Tariq pushed for additional discount and more flexible payment terms. Discussed implementation timeline and support level.

questions_asked.question: Can we do quarterly payments instead of annual upfront?
questions_asked.answer: We can offer quarterly billing with a slightly higher rate

questions_asked.question: Are there any other stakeholders we should involve before finalizing?
questions_asked.answer: I should probably get our COO's sign-off, but I'm confident they'll approve

objections: The pricing is still a bit higher than Fireflies, even with the discount

touches.ai_summary: Executive alignment meeting with Tariq Lopez present. Expected to meet COO but Tariq attended solo, mentioning COO had scheduling conflict. Tariq walked through the business case and rationale. He seemed committed but mentioned he has authority to sign.

questions_asked.question: Will the COO be able to join us today?
questions_asked.answer: Unfortunately they had something come up, but I've briefed them and have approval to move forward

questions_asked.question: What's included in the onboarding and support package?
questions_asked.answer: You'll get dedicated onboarding manager, custom workflow setup, and priority support

questions_asked.question: When would you like to target go-live?

next_steps: Schedule kickoff call with implementation team

touches.ai_summary: Email confirmation received from Tariq that he's reviewed the final contract and is ready to sign.
